applied_fixes.issue: Missing or improperly configured viewport meta tag causing poor mobile rendering and Core Web Vitals penalties.
applied_fixes.action: Add '<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">' to the document head.

applied_fixes.issue: Missing dynamic canonical URLs, creating a high risk of duplicate content indexing across parameterized URLs.
applied_fixes.action: Implement a dynamic '<link rel="canonical" href={canonicalUrl} />' tag that defaults to the current clean route.

applied_fixes.issue: Missing 'lang' attribute on the root HTML element, severely impacting screen reader accessibility and international SEO.
applied_fixes.action: Add the 'lang="en"' attribute to the root '<html>' tag.
